description.from: Given the virtuus library is available in both Python and Rust, it should load and report a valid version string. This validates the project skeleton, shared Gherkin runner, coverage tooling, and CI pipeline all work end-to-end. Spec: features/smoke/smoke_test.feature
description.to: Given the virtuus library is available in both Python and Rust, it should load and report a valid version string. Both implementations read from a shared VERSION file at the repo root, ensuring version parity. This validates the project skeleton, shared Gherkin runner, coverage tooling, and CI pipeline all work end-to-end. Spec: features/smoke/smoke_test.feature
